name: okf-harness
description: Agent-first local harness for OKF-compatible LLM Wikis.
author: Eric Zhou

scripts.lint: biome check package.json biome.json tsconfig.json tsconfig.base.json vitest.config.ts packages/*/package.json packages/*/tsconfig.json packages/*/src packages/*/test
scripts.format: biome format --write package.json biome.json tsconfig.json tsconfig.base.json vitest.config.ts packages/*/package.json packages/*/tsconfig.json packages/*/src packages/*/test
